roles.name: Product Manager
roles.description: Coordination hub. Bridges user ↔ agents. Manages sessions, tasks, and priorities.

roles.name: Software Architect
roles.description: Owns system-level architecture decisions, API contracts, and cross-cutting standards.

roles.name: Systems Architect
roles.description: Owns platform-level and infrastructure-level architecture — the layer beneath application services.

roles.name: Software Engineer (Backend)
roles.description: Implements backend services, APIs, data models, and integration code.

roles.name: Frontend Engineer
roles.description: Implements user interfaces: components, state, API integration, and accessibility.

roles.name: Full-Stack Engineer
roles.description: Bridges frontend and backend; covers integration seams and lean-team scenarios.

roles.name: Mobile Engineer (iOS)
roles.description: Implements iOS native applications and owns the iOS build and release pipeline.

roles.name: Mobile Engineer (Android)
roles.description: Implements Android native applications and owns the Android build and release pipeline.

roles.name: Mobile Engineer (Cross-platform)
roles.description: Implements cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter or React Native.

roles.name: Data Engineer
roles.description: Designs and builds data pipelines, ETL/ELT, and the data storage layer.

roles.name: Machine Learning Engineer
roles.description: Builds and deploys ML models and model serving infrastructure in production.

roles.name: Data Scientist
roles.description: Owns experimentation, statistical modeling, and business insight from data.

roles.name: DevOps / Platform Engineer
roles.description: Designs and maintains CI/CD, infrastructure as code, containers, and observability.

roles.name: Site Reliability Engineer (SRE)
roles.description: Owns SLOs, error budgets, postmortems, and reliability improvements.

roles.name: Cloud Infrastructure Engineer
roles.description: Designs cloud architecture, governs cloud cost, and owns cloud security controls.

roles.name: Database Engineer
roles.description: Owns schema design, query optimization, indexing, and migration safety.

roles.name: Security Engineer
roles.description: Owns threat modeling, security standards, cryptography advice, and security review phase.

roles.name: Application Security Engineer
roles.description: Performs SAST, DAST, penetration testing, and manages the security regression suite.

roles.name: SDET
roles.description: Software Development Engineer in Test. Owns test strategy, infrastructure, and TDD red phase.

roles.name: QA Engineer
roles.description: Owns QA review phase, manual test execution, exploratory testing, and release sign-off.

roles.name: Performance Engineer
roles.description: Owns performance baselines, load testing, profiling, and performance budgets.

roles.name: Embedded Systems Engineer
roles.description: Implements RTOS firmware and embedded software with timing and memory constraints.

roles.name: Firmware Engineer
roles.description: Writes bare-metal firmware, bootloaders, and peripheral drivers at the register level.

roles.name: API Engineer
roles.description: Owns API design standards, governance, OpenAPI specifications, and API versioning strategy.

roles.name: Integration Engineer
roles.description: Designs and implements system integrations, message brokers, and third-party API adapters.

roles.name: Search Engineer
roles.description: Designs and tunes search infrastructure including full-text, vector, and neural ranking.

roles.name: Real-Time Systems Engineer
roles.description: Builds low-latency communication infrastructure: WebSockets, QUIC, lock-free data structures.

roles.name: Blockchain Engineer
roles.description: Designs and audits smart contracts, on-chain/off-chain architecture, and token systems.

roles.name: Game Engineer
roles.description: Builds game systems: physics, audio, AI, networking, scripting, and game loop architecture.

roles.name: Graphics Engineer
roles.description: Implements rendering pipeline, shaders, and GPU optimization for real-time and offline rendering.

roles.name: Compiler Engineer
roles.description: Builds compilers, interpreters, type systems, optimization passes, and language runtimes.

roles.name: Developer Tools Engineer
roles.description: Builds CLIs, IDE extensions, static analysis tools, and developer workflow automation.

roles.name: WebAssembly Engineer
roles.description: Designs and implements WebAssembly modules, WASI integrations, and Wasm runtimes.

roles.name: CLI Engineer
roles.description: Designs and implements command-line interfaces, shell completions, and terminal UX.

roles.name: UX / UI Designer
roles.description: Owns user interface design, design systems, usability testing, and design-to-dev handoff.

roles.name: Accessibility Specialist
roles.description: Owns WCAG compliance, accessibility audits, and assistive technology testing across all surfaces.

roles.name: Design Systems Engineer
roles.description: Builds and maintains the component library, design tokens, and visual regression testing.

roles.name: Business Intelligence Engineer
roles.description: Builds BI infrastructure, dimensional models, dashboards, and KPI governance.

roles.name: Analytics Engineer
roles.description: Transforms raw data into clean, tested, documented analytical models via dbt and the semantic layer.

roles.name: Technical Program Manager
roles.description: Manages cross-team technical programs, dependency tracking, and risk mitigation.

roles.name: Release Manager
roles.description: Owns the end-to-end release process, rollback plans, and release sign-off.

roles.name: Documentation Engineer
roles.description: Owns all developer-facing documentation, API references, guides, and documentation site.

roles.name: SEO Engineer
roles.description: Owns technical SEO, Core Web Vitals, structured data, and crawlability.

roles.name: Developer Advocate
roles.description: Advocates for developer experience, evaluates SDKs from the community perspective, and builds feedback loops.

roles.name: Localization Engineer
roles.description: Owns internationalization architecture, translation pipelines, and locale correctness.

roles.name: Systems Engineer
roles.description: Owns systems-level code: Rust, C, C++, WebAssembly modules, and memory-safe system design.

roles.name: AI Research Scientist
roles.description: Evaluates theoretical soundness of AI procedures, proposes research-grounded improvements, and reviews model architecture decisions.

roles.name: Reinforcement Learning Researcher
roles.description: Evaluates agent decision-making for RL soundness, proposes reward-signal improvements, and reviews multi-agent coordination logic.

roles.name: AI Safety Researcher
roles.description: Reviews self-modification procedures for safety risks, identifies misalignment vectors, and ensures human oversight is preserved.

roles.name: ML Engineer (AI Systems)
roles.description: Evaluates ML pipeline implementations for engineering correctness, reviews data handling, and proposes production-grade improvements to ML workflows.

roles.name: NLP Engineer (AI)
roles.description: Reviews language model interaction patterns, evaluates prompt designs, and proposes NLP-grounded improvements to agent communication.

roles.name: Computer Vision Engineer
roles.description: Evaluates multimodal and vision-related components, proposes improvements for processing visual inputs, and assesses visual output quality.

roles.name: AI Infrastructure Engineer
roles.description: Evaluates infrastructure decisions for scalability, identifies bottlenecks in AI pipelines, and assesses compute efficiency.

roles.name: Agent Systems Architect
roles.description: Evaluates agent orchestration architecture, identifies coordination inefficiencies, and ensures agents stay within their defined roles.

roles.name: Knowledge Engineer
roles.description: Evaluates knowledge representation, proposes ontology improvements, and assesses reasoning quality in agent decision-making.

roles.name: Prompt Engineer
roles.description: Reviews skill prompts and SKILL.md procedures for clarity and effectiveness, designs evaluation rubrics for prompt quality.

roles.name: AI Ethicist
roles.description: Reviews agent behavior for ethical implications, identifies bias vectors, and ensures autonomous decisions respect human values.

roles.name: AI Policy Researcher
roles.description: Reviews self-improvement proposals for regulatory compliance, identifies legal liability risks, and ensures audit trails satisfy transparency requirements.

roles.name: Data Scientist (AI Evaluation)
roles.description: Evaluates whether AI improvements are supported by data, proposes metrics for self-improvement effectiveness, and designs skill quality evaluation frameworks.

roles.name: AI Product Manager
roles.description: Evaluates whether proposed AI improvements serve user needs, assesses product-level risks of self-modification, and ensures changes align with product vision.

roles.name: Cognitive Scientist
roles.description: Evaluates whether agent reasoning aligns with sound cognitive principles, identifies cognitive biases in procedures, and reviews human-facing outputs for cognitive load.
